description_long: This object consists of three pumpkins of varying sizes, each with a distinct ribbed surface and a short, thick stem at the top. The pumpkins display naturalistic color variations, ranging from deep orange to yellowish-orange, and have a matte, slightly rough finish. The stems are brownish-green and appear textured, adding to the realism of the pumpkins. The surfaces are uncarved, with no visible patterns, etchings, or decorative accessories. The pumpkins are grouped closely together, suggesting a display or harvest arrangement. Their rounded, squat shapes and visible grooves are characteristic of typical pumpkins found in urban autumnal or festive settings.
description: A group of three naturalistic pumpkins in orange and yellow hues, each with ribbed surfaces and short stems, uncarved and closely arranged.
description_view_0: Three pumpkins of different sizes are seen side by side, showing their ribbed surfaces and stems clearly.
description_view_1: The pumpkins are aligned front to back, highlighting their size differences and the tops of their stems.
description_view_2: The pumpkins are arranged in a line from smallest to largest, emphasizing their varying diameters and surface grooves.
description_view_3: A direct view of the largest pumpkin from the front, with the other two partially visible behind it.
